title: MAYJAM Fruity Fragrance Essential Oils Set 8 x 10ML, Fruits Scented Oils for Diffuser - Sweet Orange/Strawberry/Mango/Pineapple/Papaya/Lime/Banana/Passion Fruit
features: 🍓Fragrance Oils Gift Set: We selected a series of delicious and juicy fruit essential oils set, including sweet orange, strawberry, mango, pineapple, papaya, lime, banana and passion fruit oils.

🌸Pure & Natural Extract Oils: All our essential oils are made with natural plant extracts, only ever add gentle, synergistic carrier oils to enhance our steam-distilled formulas. The 10ml bottles aromatherapy oil that can help you relax after a long day.

✨Longer-Lasting Aroma: These essential oils became popular in the last century, and people still enjoy the benefits of aromatherapy today. They purify the air of unpleasant odors that stimulate your senses and relax your mind, improving your sleep and mental clarity.

❤️DIY & Homemade: Add a few drops of your favourite essential oil blend in the diffuser, humidifier, create a sweet atmosphere for yourself or a friend. You can also use this diffuser oils to make your own scented candles, perfumes, air fresheners, and more.

🎁Thoughtful Present: Each scent bottled in an amber glass bottle, which in a gorgeous and elegant box. This essential oil kit for a superb Christmas, birthday, or anniversary present for your lovers, friends, parents.
